portfolio.title: Q2 2026 Test Portfolio
portfolio.notes: 3 initiatives mixing Green, Yellow, Red. Skill should render the index table, the click-to-show detail panel, the Gantt timeline, and a portfolio H/L card with code-chip bullets.

initiatives.title: Multi-tenant Connectivity Hardening
initiatives.rag_headline: Both LLDs approved; first PR in review.
exec_bullets: Team Alpha completed the design for tenant-specific service accounts and cross-tenant DoS protection, and started implementation.
Team Bravo is delivering the dependent Portal and LifeTime changes in parallel.

initiatives.title: API Authentication Refactor
initiatives.rag_headline: M1 in progress before LLD approved — sequencing risk.
exec_bullets: Team Alpha started implementation of M1 while the LLD is still in draft.
Open decision: validation scope across two services pending alignment.
lowlights: Sequencing risk: M1 started before design approval

initiatives.title: Self-Hosted Read-Write Data Interop
initiatives.rag_headline: Implementation epic still In Design; no code shipped.
exec_bullets: Team Alpha completed the production-readiness GAP assessment.
Implementation epic is still in design; only a spike is running.
Open question: target architecture for cross-stage data access.
highlights: Spike running on the implementation epic
